args.text: Incident ownership confirmed. Beginning remediation for duplicate billing charges on orders ORD-5501, ORD-5502, ORD-5503.
Guard fix deployed and confirmed live. billing-api v3.4.1 running with double_charge_guard enabled.

args.body:

- ORD-5502: $19.99 refunded to jonas.beck@quillmail.example
